Fifth house- his intuition, grace of god, luck, and policies
with regard to future, mass death of the children, ability
to survive assassination attempts. Mass media projection.
Sixth house- failures of policies due to variety of reasons,
scams, high command pressure, debts and income ratio of the
state, health of the leaders, failures of the economy
droughts etc. policing of the state
Seventh house- foreign travel, opposition in the country.
Success over trade negotiations.
Eight house- longevity of the government, mass death, after
the end of the rules, scams and problems of the state in
unforeseen way. Natural calamities.
Ninth house- high command, judges, party main leaders.
Dharmic way of acting. Renovation of temples, religious
values and Employees of the government, law and order
situations and judiciary.
Tenth house- the longevity of functioning of the government.
Failures and success of admistration mass appeal.
